overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing exploration of the Gryffindor common room at night. The character walks through the warmly lit medieval interior with red tapestries, wooden furniture, and magical elements including a ghostly figure and burning fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: wizarding common room with trophy display

events.description: character turns slightly right toward the study area

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room past wooden cabinets and velvet furniture

notable_agents.action: student sitting in red armchair reading a book

entered.detail: tall wooden cabinet with glass doors displaying golden trophies
plush crimson sofa against the stone wall
vintage brass desk lamp with green glass shade
large embroidered tapestry with intricate patterns covering the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the Gryffindor common room with the character walking past a trophy cabinet and red velvet furniture. Warm lamplight illuminates the space as the camera moves toward a study area with a green banker's lamp and large wall tapestries. A student sits reading in an armchair to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room corner with ghostly apparition

events.description: translucent ghostly figure becomes clearly visible near the tapestry
character slows and stops briefly to observe the ghost

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the translucent ghostly figure near the wall tapestry

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure floating near the tapestry, gesturing with translucent hands

entered.detail: translucent white apparition of a bearded man in historical clothing
gold-framed oval mirror mounted on the stone wall
tall brass standing lamp with fringed shade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a translucent ghost floating near an ornate tapestry. The ghost gestures as the character observes it, with warm lamplight casting shadows on the stone walls. The scene shifts focus from the trophy area to this corner of the room with the spectral apparition.

events.description: moving from the ghost corner into the main fireplace area
character stops to stand before the fireplace and observe the flames

agents.ego_description: standing before the large stone fireplace watching the flickering flames

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair by the fire reading a book

entered.detail: large gothic stone fireplace with arched opening and burning logs
ornate wooden mantel above the fireplace with decorative carvings
set of brass fireplace tools in a stand beside the hearth
sculpted stone lion figure flanking the fireplace opening

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the ghost's location toward the grand stone fireplace, the warmest and brightest area of the room. The fire casts dancing light across the carved mantelpiece and stone lion statues as the character stops to observe the flames. Other students sit reading in the surrounding armchairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room study nook with armor display

events.description: character turns right away from the fireplace toward the armor display

agents.ego_description: walking past the fireplace toward the suit of armor and wall paintings

entered.detail: full suit of medieval plate armor standing on display
large gold-framed painting of a bearded wizard on the wall
large brass and wood terrestrial globe on a stand
dark wood writing desk with papers and ink bottles

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the warmth of the fire, the character explores the side area of the common room featuring a suit of armor, an antique globe, and framed wizard portraits. The lighting becomes slightly dimmer here, with focused illumination on the paintings and desk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the Gryffindor common room, transitioning from a cozy study area toward the radiant warmth of a grand fireplace and into a dimmer gallery of magical artifacts. It begins by gliding past trophy cabinets and red velvet furniture, moving through warm lamplight toward a student reading beneath a green banker's lamp. As the camera shifts focus, it approaches a translucent ghost floating near an ornate tapestry, where spectral light blends with the shadows of the stone walls. The scene then opens up as the character moves toward the grand stone fireplace, where dancing flames illuminate carved mantelpieces and stone lion statues. Finally, the camera drifts away from the fire's glow into a quieter side area, where the lighting dims to highlight a suit of armor, an antique globe, and framed wizard portraits.
